page: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The system features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, operating at a base clock speed of 2.3 GHz without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage consists of a bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the network interface delivers a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations place the single-core CPU performance of the AMD EPYC Milan processor in the top 10% tier, while multi-core performance ranks in the top 25%. Memory subsystem testing shows strong results, with the PassMark memory score and database operations both reaching the top 10% tier. Cryptographic and compression tasks, such as bzip3 decompression and Redis SET operations, consistently perform in the top 25% tier. However, static web serving throughput and medium-sized LLM inference tasks fall into the average tier.

From a resource density perspective, the dedicated core allocation without hyperthreading offers predictable compute performance, making it highly cost-efficient for workloads requiring sustained CPU execution. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio is tailored for compute-heavy tasks rather than memory-intensive databases. Appropriate workloads for this configuration include software compilation, ray tracing, image processing, and database operations that fit within the 64.0 GB memory limit.
description: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor on the x86_64 architecture. Operating at 2.3 GHz without hyperthreading, the instance is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and a 4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data indicates top 10% tier performance in single-core CPU execution, database operations, and memory scores, alongside top 25% tier results in multi-core processing, software compilation, and cryptography. The 2.0 GB of RAM per core ratio makes this instance highly efficient for sustained compute workloads. It is optimized for software compilation, ray tracing, image processing, and database operations.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier single-core and database benchmark performance.
meta_description: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD for sustained workloads.
tagline: A compute-optimized instance featuring thirty-two dedicated AMD EPYC cores, a bundled NVMe SSD, and top-tier database and single-core benchmark performance.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores with no hyperthreading
64.0 GB of system memory and 400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Top 10% tier performance in single-core CPU and database benchmarks
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with one public IPv4 address
Suited for software compilation, ray tracing, and database operations
